eu.title: Data stays in the EU

bilingual.title: Bilingual from day one
bilingual.description: Every system we build is Greek and English natively. No awkward translation layer. We speak the market.

proven.title: Proven in Cyprus
proven.description: We've delivered for ICPAC, Chtisma Trading, Inspektra, and the Cyprus Medical Council. Named clients, real results, local market knowledge.

anadCallout.label: ANAD Certified Training
anadCallout.headline: AI training for your team — up to 80% subsidised.
anadCallout.description: We are ANAD-approved training providers. Your staff can access our AI and digital transformation programmes with up to 80% of the cost covered by the Human Resource Development Authority of Cyprus.

cta.headline: Ready to build something real?

webApps.description: Full-stack custom applications with authentication, databases, and APIs. Built for your specific workflow.

aiMvp.description: From idea to deployed product in 4-8 weeks. Full-stack with AI integration from day one.

inspektraCallout.quote: We built 6 custom PostHog analytics dashboards for Inspektra's field service platform. €5,600. Delivered on time. Still running.

noTemplates.heading: We don't do templates.
noTemplates.body: Most agencies sell you a WordPress theme with a logo swap. You pay monthly for hosting you don't control, can't export your data, and hit a wall every time you need something custom. We build differently.
noTemplates.bullet1: You own the code, not a rental
noTemplates.bullet3: No platform fee that doubles when you scale
noTemplates.bullet4: We stay after launch — not a handover-and-goodbye shop

meta.title: Growth & Marketing
meta.description: Full-stack growth from strategy to execution. Market entry, paid ads, funnels, outreach, and automation for businesses in Cyprus and the region.

hero.label: Growth & Marketing
hero.headline: Full-stack growth — from strategy to execution.
hero.subheadline: We've taken companies from Lebanon into Cyprus and from Cyprus into Europe. We build the systems, run the campaigns, and automate the follow-up.

marketEntry.title: Market Entry Strategy
marketEntry.description: The Schedex model. Competitor audit, ICP definition, channel infrastructure, and a 90-day launch plan for new markets.

paidAds.title: Paid Ads Management
paidAds.description: Meta and Google campaigns. Creative, targeting, optimisation, and weekly reporting. Bilingual ad copy.

funnels.title: Sales Funnel Builds
funnels.description: Landing pages, lead magnets, email sequences, and conversion tracking. Built in Next.js, not ClickFunnels.

outreach.title: Cold Outreach Systems
outreach.description: Signal-based prospecting. We find companies showing buying signals and reach them before your competitors do.

social.title: Social Media Management
social.description: Content calendar, posting, engagement, and reporting across LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook.

automations.title: Marketing Automations
automations.description: Automated email sequences, lead scoring, CRM workflows, and notification systems. All self-hosted on n8n.

seo.title: SEO & Content
seo.description: Technical SEO, content strategy, blog writing, and local SEO for Google Maps and Cyprus-specific search.

schedex.quote: We helped Schedex expand from Lebanon into Cyprus with a 90-day market entry programme — competitor audit, ICP definition, channel infrastructure, and launch.

meta.title: About
meta.description: HN Innovaco is a digital transformation and AI company based in Larnaca, Cyprus. We build real systems, maintain them after launch, and think in terms of long-term value.

hero.label: About HN Innovaco
hero.headline: We're building something different in Larnaca.
hero.subheadline: A digital transformation and AI company that builds real systems, maintains them after launch, and thinks in terms of long-term value.

company.p1: HN Innovaco is a technology company based in Larnaca, Cyprus. We build AI systems, custom software, and growth infrastructure for businesses in Cyprus and the Eastern Mediterranean.
company.p2: We are not a traditional agency. We don't sell templates, retainers for vague deliverables, or dashboards nobody checks. Every project has a defined scope, a clear price, and a measurable outcome.
company.p3: We chose Cyprus because the market needs what we do. Businesses here are ready for AI and digital transformation but lack local partners who can build, deploy, and maintain systems in both Greek and English on infrastructure that stays in the EU.

harry.name: Harry Newton
harry.title: Founder & CEO
harry.bio1: Harry is a technologist and entrepreneur who founded HN Innovaco to bring production-grade AI and digital transformation to the Cyprus market. His background spans software development, AI deployment, and business strategy.
harry.bio2: He is an ANAD-certified trainer and has presented at the EULEP Final Conference in Brussels on AI applications in professional services. He has delivered AI chatbots for ICPAC, dual deployments for Chtisma Trading, and analytics suites for Inspektra.
harry.bio3: Harry is building HN Innovaco as the anchor tech institution in Larnaca — a company that trains, builds, and ships real technology for the local and regional market.
harry.cred4: AI systems deployed for ICPAC, Chtisma, and others
harry.cred5: Doctor registry platform — Cyprus Medical Council
harry.cred6: Market entry strategy — Schedex (Lebanon to Cyprus and EU)

nikolas.name: Nikolas Manitaras
nikolas.title: Co-Founder
nikolas.bio: Nikolas brings deep commercial networks and operational experience across Cyprus and Greece. He focuses on partnerships, client relationships, and market development.

v1.name: Build real things
v1.description: Every project ships. We don't do strategy decks that sit in a drawer.

v2.name: Own the infrastructure
v2.description: Your code, your servers, your data. No vendor lock-in, no surprise fees.

v3.name: Speak plainly
v3.description: Clear scope, clear price, clear timeline. No jargon unless it helps.

v4.name: Stay after launch
v4.description: We maintain what we build. Support, updates, and improvements are part of the deal.

v5.name: Think in equity
v5.description: We take equity in the right projects. When we invest, our incentives align with yours.

vision.label: The vision
vision.headline: Building the Larnaca tech ecosystem
vision.p1: Larnaca is changing. New businesses, new residents, new ambitions. But the tech infrastructure hasn't kept pace. There is no local AI company. No training centre. No place where a business owner can walk in and say: I need this built.
vision.p2: That is what we are building. Not just a services company, but a hub — a physical and digital centre for technology in Larnaca that trains teams, builds products, and creates local capability.
vision.p3: This is ambitious. It is also already underway. Every chatbot we deploy, every team we train, every client we serve adds to the ecosystem.
vision.practice1: Studio and webinar space for workshops and events
vision.practice3: AI-first incubator for local product ideas
vision.practice4: Regional technology reputation anchored in Larnaca
